ops.title: tilth fully removed across v0.22-v0.25 (2026-07-16/17); every op native; the traps that cost cycles during the migration
ops.body:
The tilth engine is GONE from cc-context as of v0.25.0 (2026-07-17). Four releases: v0.22 de-vendored ast-grep (PATH dep, 0.44.0 floor in `internal/astgrep/resolve.go`, version memo stores passes only so in-place upgrades recover); v0.23 native read/overview + ripgrep-only grep; v0.24 native outline-fallback/diff/history; v0.25 native symbol/deps + `internal/dispatch` table (router/`Backend` interface/`internal/vendor`/`internal/grok`/`render/diff.go` all deleted; semble is the only resident MCP engine, `internal/semble`). This supersedes [[ccx-v015-native-find-overhaul]]'s "tilth kept for symbol/deps/diff" and the "per-op peel-off, not replacement" cc-note (superseded by note cd83f67; rollout task dbf1c0e done; bugs 777edc9 + 50ae868 closed).

**Why:** tilth's own stale index mislabeled `read --section` line numbers by 11 (grep agreed — same index); the repo already carried two staleness band-aids. Native ops compute fresh from the working tree per call — `anchor.Files`/outline memos are per-call by law, never cross-call, never disk.

**How to apply (the traps):**
- jj ships bypass prek — run `task lint` before EVERY `ccx vcs ship` or CI goes red (cost 3 red cycles before the lesson stuck; papercut filed).
- `ast-grep outline --match RE` matches item **signatures**, not names (`--match Widget` also returns methods mentioning Widget) — always post-filter on `FlatItem.Name`/`Qualified`. `ast-grep outline` always exits 0; a missing path prints ERROR to stderr at exit 0.
- Shared-@ concurrency worked via scoped ship + hunk-scoped ship: the other session's `internal/hunk` package became the diff engine's foundation (no unified-diff parsing anywhere — blobs + `hunk.Compute`); when both sessions fixed the same lint lines, dedupe the doubled `//nolint`s and ship the merge.
- The anchor canary is now `TestAnchorsEmittedAcrossOps` — every native op must emit anchors at generation; per-op flips must hit BOTH dispatch seams (now just `internal/dispatch`) in one commit.
- `ripgrep.RunFound` is gone (folded into `Run`); `ripgrep.Matches` + `astgrep.OutlinePaths`/`Flatten` are the composition APIs symbol/deps build on.
- Residue deliberately kept: CHANGELOG + bench/analysis (history) and three `internal/astgrep/testdata/*_stream.jsonl` fixtures recorded over the old tilth.go (re-record = backlog task 7cda024).
